raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says they cancelled a first visit the same day, were still charged about $100, could not remove their card, and had trouble getting a working contact response.
notes: Strong operational trust issue. Relevant to cancellation policy, billing clarity, card management, and support escalation.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says the virtual provider was late, initially discussed ADHD care, then changed course and referred them elsewhere without follow-through, leaving the patient feeling they paid without getting useful care.
notes: Detailed complaint. Relevant to provider reliability, care-plan clarity, and follow-through after appointment.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says their appointment was cancelled on the day of service because of medications they take, after they had called earlier to confirm there would not be a problem.
notes: Specific complaint about same-day cancellation and medication continuity. Useful for operational risk analysis.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says they chose Legion for ADHD diagnosis and treatment, felt understood and included in the treatment plan, and received a prompt callback when they had questions.
notes: Strong positive review. Supports the idea that care quality and team responsiveness can be strong when the process works well.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says it was a relief to find a psychiatric provider who cares, makes them feel heard, and offers an easy signup process.
notes: Positive but general. Supports activation and provider-quality strengths.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says Bridgett Gant wants their input on what to try next, making the care process feel more manageable.
notes: Short Zocdoc snippet. Supports collaborative care and patient involvement.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says the whole process feels more personal than expected for online care and helps reduce anxiety.
notes: Supports telehealth experience and provider relationship quality.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says after waiting more than six months for a primary-care referral, they were glad they found Legion.
notes: Supports access and speed as a value proposition compared with traditional referral paths.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says session questions helped them notice patterns they had not seen before and left them feeling more grounded.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says the telehealth setup is simple to use even on busy days and makes it easier to stick with treatment.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says they were able to talk about things they usually keep to themselves and are slowly starting to feel more like themselves.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says the way things are explained makes everything less confusing and makes daily life easier.

raw_review_text: Paraphrase: Patient says they feel safer bringing up hard topics than before and that this has helped their anxiety.
